meta.siteDescription: Terminal-style blog by Irwin Arruda Sales. Software Developer, Vim enthusiast, tool builder.

aboutPage.name: Irwin Arruda
aboutPage.whoamiBody: Software engineer focused on building web applications that feel fast and well-crafted. React has been my primary tool for years, but I genuinely enjoy exploring other approaches - Solid.js, Svelte, Vue - anything that makes the frontend better. I care about developer experience, clean state management, and tools that get out of the way.

projects.name: Mobx Simple Store
projects.description: A performant alternative to MobX State Tree for creating reactive state tree stores. Removes features that cause performance bottlenecks with large datasets

projects.name: The Chatbot
projects.description: A general-purpose digital assistant that integrates with WhatsApp, Google Sheets for expense tracking, and uses MCP for AI tool invocations

projects.name: Paper Brick
projects.description: A macOS system tray app for changing wallpapers quickly. Scans a directory for images and lets you set one in a single click. Built with Tauri and Solid.js

projects.name: Pro Cris App
projects.description: A React Native app that helps teachers manage their work schedule, pricing, and student registration with daily routines and receipt generation

projects.name: Study on Micro-frontends
projects.description: A hands-on study integrating React, Vue, and Svelte in one app using Webpack Module Federation with shared MobX global state

projects.name: Goals Tracker
projects.description: A React Native app for tracking daily habits with goal cards, a coin-based cheat day system, and notes for completed or missed days
